title: Salty Gooey Middle Eastern Mushrooms Wrap
description: A light, vegetarian wrap bursting with sauteed wild mushrooms, tangy tahini sauce, and aromatic Middle Eastern spices.
instructions: Toss the mushrooms with olive oil, sumac, za'atar, cumin, and sea salt. Spread on a baking sheet and roast for 15 minutes until golden and caramelized.
In a small bowl, whisk together tahini, lemon juice, and a splash of warm water until smooth and creamy. Stir in chickpeas until evenly coated.
Lay a flatbread on a clean surface, spread a generous layer of tahini chickpea mixture, and top with roasted mushrooms and chopped parsley. Fold the edges over the filling and roll tightly.
Serve the wrap warm, optionally drizzling a little extra olive oil or a squeeze of lemon for extra brightness. Enjoy the salty, gooey Middle Eastern flavors!
